name: Tex-Mex Baked Beans
recipeIngredient: 16 ounces navy beans, canned, rinsed and drained
16 ounces kidney beans, canned, rinsed and drained
16 ounces pinto beans, canned, rinsed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium-high heat until hot.
2. Add onion and peppers; saute until tender.
3. Combine beans, tomatoes, oregano, cumin, and peppers in a 3-quart casserole coated with nonstick cooking spray.
4. Cover the casserole and bake for 1 hour at 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
